must_detect.matched_text: Structure: Proposed acquisition of 70% equity interest in the Target and establishment of a long-term supply and distribution alliance.

Financing: Shariah-compliant commodity murabahah/Tawarruq facility to be arranged by Bintang Nusantara Capital, with tenor, security, and profit rate to be agreed; no firm amounts are set in this draft.

MNPI notice: As of this draft, the contemplated vendor financing tranche and the revised earn-out schedule have not been released on Bursa Malaysia and may constitute material non-public information for Lautan Suri Berhad under the CMSA.
